case_title: MICHAEL HARRINGTON VS. NORTHWEST AIRLINES INC.

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-29-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

CIVIL RIGHTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRINGTON, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT NORTHWEST AIRLINES INC. NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-28-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-30-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-13-2003
